bead.title: Incorporate historical success rate into routing candidate scoring
bead.description: scoreCandidate currently scores candidates by cost class, subscription status, and quota — but ignores historical success rate. With 298 executions of data, providers with 100% success (claude/sonnet) should be strongly preferred over providers with 33% success (local qwen). Add a success-rate bonus/penalty to scoreCandidate that reads from the routing metrics store.
bead.acceptance:
1. New field HistoricalSuccessRate float64 on CandidatePlan (-1 when insufficient data, i.e. < 3 samples).
2. BuildCandidatePlans populates HistoricalSuccessRate from RoutingMetricsStore.ReadOutcomes() when the store directory is configured.
3. scoreCandidate applies: +20 when success rate >= 0.8, +0 when between 0.5-0.8, -30 when < 0.5 (and sufficient data). No change when data is insufficient.
4. Unit test: candidate with 90% success rate scores higher than candidate with 30% success rate at same cost class.
5. Unit test: candidate with < 3 samples gets no bonus or penalty.
6. cd cli && go test -run TestSuccessRate ./... && go build .
